description_long: This is a compact, rectangular toaster with a smooth, dark metallic exterior and a matte black base. The top surface features two elongated toast slots, each with a dark interior and subtle metallic edges, designed to accommodate standard slices of bread. The sides are gently rounded, giving the appliance a modern, minimalist appearance, while the front and back are flat and unadorned except for a small lever or button on one side. The toaster's finish is sleek and slightly reflective, suggesting a durable metal or high-quality plastic construction. No visible branding, control knobs, or crumb tray are apparent from the exterior views. The overall design is functional and understated, suitable for placement in urban kitchens, break rooms, or communal spaces.
description: A sleek, dark metallic toaster with two top slots and a minimalist, rounded design. The exterior is smooth and unbranded, with no visible controls or crumb tray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smooth, dark face of the toaster with no visible controls or branding.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the two toast slots on top and the subtle lever or button on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, rounded back of the toaster with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the toast slots from a different perspective, with no controls visible.
attribute_toast_slots: Two elongated toast slots on top, evenly spaced, with dark interiors and metallic edges.
